identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a Bloomberg-grade, data-dense investor terminal. Tactical, high-contrast, zero-fluff.

layout.spacing_scale: Relaxed but precise (gap-4 for data, gap-8 for sections)
rules: Use 'Grid Borders' style: Visible 1px borders between data cells.
Dashboard widgets must span full height to avoid jagged bottoms.
Sidebar navigation should be fixed on the left (w-64) for desktop.
Use 'View' toggles (List vs Grid) for Investor Database.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-bold rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-xs px-6 py-2.5 transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 font-medium rounded-sm text-xs px-4 py-2.5

cards.base_class: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-zinc-800 rounded-none relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.base_class: bg-black border border-zinc-800 focus:border-blue-600 rounded-none text-sm font-mono placeholder:text-zinc-700 h-10

tables.header_class: bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-500 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-zinc-800 h-10
tables.row_class: border-b border-zinc-900/50 hover:bg-blue-900/10 transition-colors font-mono text-sm h-12

visual_enhancers.shadows: None by default. Use 'Glow' for active states.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for sticky top/bottom bars: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the main background (optional)

icons.usage_guide: Use Duotone weight. Primary color: White, Secondary color: Blue-500 (opacity 20%).

media.usage_rules: Images should be used with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70) to ensure text legibility. They are strictly for background texture, not focal points.

instructions_to_main_agent: ENFORCE DARK MODE: Add 'dark' class to the <html> or <body> tag immediately.
USE SHADCN CAREFULLY: Do not use default white cards. Override with bg-[#0A0A0A] and border-zinc-800.
DATA VISUALIZATION: Use Recharts. Style charts with the 'Deep Obsidian' palette (Blue, Emerald, Purple on dark bg).
LAYOUT: Implement a persistent Sidebar for navigation (Dashboard, Investors, News, Events, etc.).
TABLES: The Investor Database table is the core feature. It must support sorting, filtering, and pagination. Use a sticky header.
IDEA MATCH: Use the 'idea_match_bg' image with a glassmorphism overlay for the AI matching input section.
NEWS AGGREGATOR: Design as a 'Ticker' or dense feed list, not large blog cards.
NO AUTH: Do not build login pages. Direct user to Dashboard immediately.
universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid dark grays/blacks.
DO NOT use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Use rounded-sm or rounded-none for a sharp, technical feel.
ALL interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Never use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use Barlow Condensed.
